WVR_1915C_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
1915(c) Waiver Type Code — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: A code to indicate the type of 1915(c) waiver under which the beneficiary received coverage; most 
recent in the calendar year.

LONG NAME: WVR_1915C_TYPE_CD

CHAR

2

Waiver
